snapshots.name: yoy-month-post-calc-growth-happy
snapshots.sql_normalized:
SELECT "salesDate$year", "salesDate$month", "salesAmount", "salesAmount__prior", "salesAmount__diff", "salesAmount__ratio", "salesAmount__ratio" * 100 AS "growthPercent"
FROM (SELECT "salesDate$year", "salesDate$month", "salesAmount", "salesAmount__prior", ("salesAmount" - "salesAmount__prior") AS "salesAmount__diff", CASE WHEN (("salesAmount__prior" IS NULL) OR ("salesAmount__prior" = 0)) THEN NULL ELSE (("salesAmount" - "salesAmount__prior") / "salesAmount__prior") END AS "salesAmount__ratio"
FROM (WITH cte_1 AS (SELECT "salesDate$year", "salesDate$month", "salesAmount" AS "salesAmount"
FROM (select	d1.year "salesDate$year",	d1.month "salesDate$month",	SUM(t1.sales_amount) "salesAmount"	from fact_sales t1	 left join dim_date d1  on t1.date_key=d1.date_key	group by d1.year,	d1.month) AS cte_0),
cte_2 AS (SELECT ("salesDate$year" + 1) AS "salesDate$year", "salesDate$month", "salesAmount" AS "salesAmount__prior"
FROM (select	d1.year "salesDate$year",	d1.month "salesDate$month",	SUM(t1.sales_amount) "salesAmount"	from fact_sales t1	 left join dim_date d1  on t1.date_key=d1.date_key	group by d1.year,	d1.month) AS cte_0)
SELECT cte_1."salesDate$year", cte_1."salesDate$month", cte_1."salesAmount", cte_2."salesAmount__prior"
FROM cte_1
LEFT JOIN cte_2 ON cte_1."salesDate$year" = cte_2."salesDate$year" AND cte_1."salesDate$month" = cte_2."salesDate$month") AS cte_3) AS cte_4

snapshots.name: rolling_7d-post-calc-gap-happy
snapshots.sql_normalized:
WITH cte_2 AS (SELECT "salesDate$id", "salesAmount", "salesAmount__rolling_7d", "salesAmount" - "salesAmount__rolling_7d" AS "rollingGap"
FROM (SELECT "salesDate$id", "salesAmount", SUM("salesAmount") OVER (ORDER BY "salesDate$id" ASC ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "salesAmount__rolling_7d"
FROM (select	t1.date_key "salesDate$id",	SUM(t1.sales_amount) "salesAmount"	from fact_sales t1		group by t1.date_key) AS cte_0) AS cte_1)
SELECT cte_2."salesDate$id", cte_2."salesAmount", cte_2."salesAmount__rolling_7d", cte_2."rollingGap"
FROM cte_2
